attempts.description: Added per-row Approve/Reject buttons for runs in the reviewing state and a Cancel button for in-flight states on the History page. Stuck Reviewing runs can now be cleared in one click without leaving the page.
change_overview: apps/gui/windows/history.py: 6th Actions column with state-aware buttons
wired existing runs.approve / runs.reject / runs.cancel RPCs to row buttons
attempts.risk_note: Buttons only appear for the matching states; final-state runs show no actions and are unaffected.
next_steps: Pull main, restart service+GUI, open History tab
Click Approve or Reject on the Reviewing runs to clear them
attempts.annotation_excerpt: two entries with state Reviewing the rest are aborted

attempts.description: Added a Remove button on each workspace row in the Home Workspace map plus a workspaces.remove RPC. Confirmation dialog explains runs are preserved and the repo on disk is untouched.
attempts.risk_note: Foreign-key cascade not enforced; runs.workspace_id can dangle. Documented in the confirmation copy.
next_steps: Click Remove next to the docs workspace and confirm
attempts.annotation_excerpt: there is an entry on the workspace app

attempts.description: This is the annotators single-pick mode behaviour: an empty area inside a QScrollArea viewport resolves to the viewport widget itself rather than to the cells inside, so the whole section appears highlighted. AgentOrchestra cannot influence the picker.
next_steps: Use the multi_click mode for picking individual widgets one at a time
Or use the area mode to draw a precise rectangle around the cells of interest
attempts.annotation_excerpt: I cant select individual fields here

attempts.description: Added a tooltip on the Replay button explaining its purpose (re-run a past run with optional provider/model swap; ideal for Claude-vs-Gemini comparisons). Also added claude-cli and gemini-cli to the Replay dialogs provider dropdown so operators can actually swap to a CLI from the UI.
attempts.risk_note: Tooltip is purely additive; dropdown change preserves existing entries.
next_steps: Pull main, restart GUI, hover Replay to see the explanation
Select a past run, click Replay, choose claude-cli or gemini-cli to re-run under the other vendor
